live_newsroom.title: NBA board
live_newsroom.headline: NBA board
live_newsroom.snapshot: San Antonio faces elimination at home in Game 6 of the Western Conference finals, with Victor Wembanyama and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander anchoring the main player context. NBA.com lists the game for 8:30 p.m. ET; FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 with a 219.5 total, so the spread, total and player-prop screen deserve the first betting read.

live_newsroom.title: Betting odds
live_newsroom.headline: Betting odds
live_newsroom.snapshot: The market gives Chicago Cubs a modest edge, which makes line movement and book-to-book differences worth checking. A -136 moneyline implies roughly 57.6% before vig. Chicago Cubs is getting more expensive, which usually points to stronger support or new information behind the favorite. Weather is not extreme, but the total still needs a final check before lineups lock.

sections.title: Futures Watch
cards: College Football Futures: Keep the board visible year-round because bettors track long-range prices months before kickoff.
NFL Futures: Watch schedule strength, quarterback health, roster movement and divisional prices.
NBA Futures: Track playoff paths, injury news, rest patterns and championship price movement.
NHL Futures: Watch goalie health, playoff seeding, travel spots and market adjustment.
Soccer Futures: Track title races, promotion/relegation pressure, tournament paths and transfer-window movement.
Tennis/Golf Futures: Draws, form, surface, course fit and injury news can reshape prices quickly.
sections.headline: Futures Watch

homepage_cards.headline: Oklahoma City Thunder at San Antonio Spurs
homepage_cards.matchup: Oklahoma City Thunder at San Antonio Spurs
homepage_cards.market_context: Spurs -3.5; total 219.5; moneyline and props need a final pre-tip check.
homepage_cards.line_movement: MOVEMENT: compare opener to current spread, total, moneyline and props
key_data: GAME: Thunder at Spurs, Game 6, Thursday May 28, 2026, 8:30 p.m. ET.
MARKET: NBA playoff spread, total, moneyline and player props.
LINE / ODDS: FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 and total 219.5.
IMPLIED PROBABILITY: check posted moneyline before publication.
MOVEMENT: compare the opener with current prices before tipoff.

homepage_cards.why_it_matters: San Antonio faces elimination at home in Game 6 of the Western Conference finals, with Victor Wembanyama and Shai Gilgeous-Alexander anchoring the main player context. NBA.com lists the game for 8:30 p.m. ET; FanDuel Research lists Spurs -3.5 with a 219.5 total, so the spread, total and player-prop screen deserve the first betting read.

editorial_standard.label: GSR Network Editorial Standard
editorial_standard.text: No gambling advice or picks. Prices, injuries, lineups, weather and fantasy usage are organized for human betting context.
